sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-centered-quantized matrix converter. It unpacks the testbench input ordering, converts IEEE-754 FP32 values to real for simulation, applies Q15 scale quantization, saturates to the unsigned quantized range, subtracts zero-point, and emits signed centered integer values.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_gemm: Combinational integer GEMM core. It multiplies centered quantized A and B operands and accumulates K products into signed INT32 accumulators for every VLEN by VLEN output element.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantization block. It converts signed INT32 accumulators back to FP32 using the product of Q15 scale_A and scale_B, packing outputs in the order consumed by the provided testbench.
